task.en: On the Desktop there is an image file named `logo.png`. Open it in the Preview app and export it as a JPEG image. Save the exported file to the Desktop with the name `logo.jpg`. (Use Preview's File menu — Export… — and choose JPEG as the format.) Leave the original `logo.png` in place.

pre_command: DESK="$HOME/Desktop"; mkdir -p "$DESK"; rm -f "$DESK/logo.jpg" "$DESK/logo.jpeg"; SRC=""; for C in '/System/Library/CoreServices/DefaultDesktop.heic' '/System/Library/CoreServices/Finder.app/Contents/Resources/Finder.icns' '/System/Applications/Preview.app/Contents/Resources/AppIcon.icns' '/System/Library/CoreServices/CoreTypes.bundle/Contents/Resources/GenericApplicationIcon.icns'; do [ -e "$C" ] && { SRC="$C"; break; }; done; [ -n "$SRC" ] && sips -s format png -z 512 512 "$SRC" --out "$DESK/logo.png" >/dev/null 2>&1
grading_command: OUT="$HOME/Desktop/logo.jpg"; [ -f "$OUT" ] || { echo False; exit 0; }; F=$(sips -g format "$OUT" 2>/dev/null | awk '/format:/{print $2}'); { [ "$F" = "jpeg" ] || [ "$F" = "jpg" ]; } && echo True || echo False
